commentary: FY 2025: price/sales 2.9345, operating profit 3.97B, normalized NI proxy 2.31B.
Normalized net income proxy growth is -4.15% YoY, trend declining.
Normalized P/E proxy is 20.46x based on current market cap.
5Y market-cap payback ratio is 29.2% using 3Y geometric revenue growth.
commentaryZh: FY 2025：市销率 2.9345，营业利润 3.97B，扣非净利润代理值 2.31B。
扣非净利润代理值同比增速为 -4.15%，趋势走弱。
近 3 年营收几何增速为 5.99%。
基于当前市值得到的扣非净利润市盈率代理值为 20.46 倍。
按 3 年营收几何增速投射，未来 5 年市值回收率为 29.2%。
methodology: Fee-adjusted net income proxy = net income - stock-based compensation expense.
Normalized net income proxy = fee-adjusted net income proxy - absolute special items.
5Y market-cap payback ratio = projected next 5 years normalized NI proxy sum / current market cap.
Projection growth uses 3Y geometric revenue growth.
methodologyZh: 扣费净利润代理值 = 净利润 - 股权激励费用。
扣非净利润代理值 = 扣费净利润代理值 - 特殊项目绝对值。
5 年市值回收率 = 未来 5 年扣非净利润代理值预测总和 / 当前市值。
增长投射默认使用 3 年营收几何增速。
